business.name: Sand Gallery
business.idea: Continuously build, test, and improve portfolio projects for sand.gallery

current_goal.description: Reinstate gallery crons + upgrade to rigorous testing protocol
current_goal.milestone: Every project validated by actual gameplay before marking done
current_goal.task: Reinstated 3 staggered crons. Gallery builder skill upgraded with rigorous gameplay testing. Each cycle now requires: (1) Playwright technical check + (2) Actual gameplay for 2-3 min + (3) Specific bug fixes based on observations + (4) Testing notes in log

crons.notes: Decision: 30% new projects, 70% updates. All must pass gameplay testing.

testing_protocol.playwright_check: required - technical validation (loads, no 404s, no JS errors)
testing_protocol.report_in_log: specific observations, what worked, what broke, what was fixed

progress.action: Upgraded gallery builder to rigorous testing protocol
progress.details: Skill now requires actual gameplay testing (2-3 min per project), specific bug reports, and testing notes in log. Playwright only catches technical issues — gameplay testing catches real UX problems. Critical bugs must be fixed before marking done.

progress.action: Fixed Firestore gallery_categories URLs for all 15 game/app/tool entries
progress.details: All gallery_categories/{games,apps,tools}/items had broken URLs — wrong domain, full GitHub URLs instead of github.io, garbage URLs. Fixed all to https://thesandemon.github.io/{repo}/. Pushed sandbox iframe fix to sand-gallery repo.

next_goal: Reinstate 3 staggered gallery crons, begin cycle with rigorous gameplay testing
